reviews.comment:
buena atención
el bar no tiene casi nada cierra a ñas 21

(Translated by Google)
Good service.
The bar has almost nothing and closes at 9 pm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15679973824289135347/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXLUxibV9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una buena parada, tanto para los viajeros como para los lugareños. Por la calidad reconocida que brinda la marca YPF y las varias opciones y ventajas que ofrece el ACA a todos sus socios en todo el país. La recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
A good stop for both travelers and locals. Thanks to the renowned quality of the YPF brand and the various options and benefits that the ACA offers to all its members across the country. I recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15679973824289135347/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLWJpUjNnRRAB

The bathrooms were spotless.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por tu comentario Alejandra!

reviews.comment:
Buena estacione de servicio. El baño era limpio, pero tiene un solo baño, insuficiente ya que ahí van todos los qye vienen de las playas.

(Translated by Google)
Good service station. The bathroom was clean, but there's only one, which is insufficient since everyone coming from the beaches uses it.

reviews.comment:
Muy agradable y atentos los empleados para atenderte siempre voy a YPF A C A Viedma

(Translated by Google)
Very nice and attentive employees to serve you. I always go to YPF A C A Viedma.

reviews.comment:
Horrible estación, mal servicio, mal iluminada de noche, atención muy lenta. Es para salir del paso y nada más.

(Translated by Google)
Horrible station, bad service, poorly lit at night, very slow service. It's only good for getting by and nothing more.
